description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 3rd; Weight â; Price +18,000 gp DESCRIPTION A suit of armor or a shield with this special ability protects against one type of energy (acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic) and is designed with patterns depicting the element it protects against. The armor absorbs the first 10 points of energy damage per attack that the wearer would normally take (similar to the resist energy spell). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells resist energy; Cost +9,000 gp
